creator: niclas.zeising@gmail.com
text:
I forgot to mention that the patch in
libpurple/files/patch-finch_libgnt_gntwm.c needs to be removed as well,
to make this build. I am not 100% sure that it's correct to remove it,
rather than regenerate it, but I'm unsure to what's the purpose of it to
begin with, since _XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED is not defined to begin with,
as far as I can tell. Hopefully the maintainer knows this code better
and can shed light on it.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
